key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How frequently the network speed is polled from /proc/net/dev. Lower values give more responsive readings but consume more CPU. Recommended range: 1000–3000.

key.name: use-bits
key.summary: Display speed in bits per second
key.description: When true, speeds are shown in Kbps/Mbps (bits). When false, speeds are shown in KB/s/MB/s (bytes). Default is bytes (false).

key.name: show-upload
key.description: Whether to display the upload (TX) speed in the panel.

key.name: show-download
key.description: Whether to display the download (RX) speed in the panel.
